prompt: You previously discussed chains and bands for strength. What about using accommodating resistance for hypertrophy specifically?
assertions: States the likely effect is neutral-to-positive if used intelligently
Warns against adding so much band/chain tension that lockout becomes the limiter
Notes that excessive accommodating resistance can reduce meaningful loading in stretched positions
Acknowledges direct hypertrophy data are sparse
Recommends moderate accommodating resistance with meaningful full-ROM challenge
